data.title: Ethereum Faces Challenges Amid Rising Competition In 2025
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, the Ethereum blockchain is experiencing significant challenges in 2025. Despite the ongoing bull market, Ether (ETH), Ethereum's native token, remains significantly below its all-time highs. Additionally, its value relative to Bitcoin (BTC) has been steadily declining for over three years. As competition among layer-1 networks intensifies and market sentiment rises, questions are emerging about whether Ethereum's peak days are behind it.

The Ethereum network has long been a cornerstone for decentralized applications, smart contracts, and decentralized finance (DeFi). However, newer blockchains are emerging as formidable competitors, with some surpassing Ethereum in critical areas. Concerns about economic sustainability and usability issues have fueled growing skepticism about the network's future prospects.

Cointelegraph conducted interviews with leading experts and analysts to gain insights into Ethereum's current situation. While Ethereum still benefits from its first-mover advantage, the increasing competition and internal challenges raise questions about its long-term viability. The central question remains: Can Ethereum overcome its current struggles, or is it at risk of being overshadowed by newer technologies?

data.title: MOEX Suspends Evening Trading as Russian Markets Rally on Trump Call
data.description:
Russia’s Moscow Exchange Group (MOEX) has suspended evening trading on the stock market after discovering issues with data transmission. In a February 13 statement, MOEX announced that the evening trading suspension was coordinated with market participants. The decision follows a surge in the Russian ruble and stocks earlier in the day, driven by a phone call between U.S. President Donald...
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/02/14/moex-suspends-evening-trading-as-russian-markets-rally-on-trump-call/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=moex-suspends-evening-trading-as-russian-markets-rally-on-trump-call

data.title: Bitcoin Price: Air Gap Between $90K-$70K? Risk Of Sharp Decline
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) price remains below the $100,000 milestone, with prospects for a further downside if selling pressure increases. Cognizant of the broader liquidity challenges in the industry, analysts urge caution, citing the presence of the colloquial “air gap” in the BTC chart. The air gap, representing an area devoid of buyers waiting to interact with […]

source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/14/bitcoin-price-air-gap-between-90k-70k-risk-of-sharp-decline/
